ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "stripe_id" TEXT /* Stripe account identifier for payment processing */,
  "payout_id" TEXT /* Payout account identifier if available */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "avatar" TEXT /* Path to the user's avatar image */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name for contractors, if applicable */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname or preferred name of the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (Contractor or Homeowner) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the contractor, if applicable */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Years of experience in the relevant field */,
  "licenses" TEXT /* Licenses held by the contractor */,
  "isBoarded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is onboarded or not */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user for payouts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user (e.g., unverified, verified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the job request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job needed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the job was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the job was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the job (e.g., construction, cleaning) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the job (e.g., painting, plumbing) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the job needs to be done */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the contract */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job this contract relates to */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor assigned to the job */,
  "amount" REAL /* Agreed amount for the job */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the contract (e.g., upfront, milestones) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contractor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contractor_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to this payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid or to be paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to this review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the homeowner (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verification_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, license) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* Path to the document */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the document has been verified or not */,
  "verified_at" TEXT /* Date the document was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_verification_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the work experience */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has this work experience */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the user worked */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user at that company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the work experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the work experience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the work experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_experience_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the license */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who holds this license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., contractor, electrician) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Number of the license */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
